blocks.text: Bodø/Glimt stun Inter Milan — Norway's Champions League fairytale
Glimt's 2-1 win at Inter on Tuesday is the result of the season. Thursday is quiet — but the weekend delivers Arsenal-Chelsea and Barcelona with title stakes on every front.
⚽ Sat 16:15 — Barcelona host Villarreal at Camp Nou, La Liga title race on the line
